---
title: ""
---

::: {.landing-container}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.landing-image}

<div style="margin-top: 0.95em;"></div>  
I am a PhD Candidate at the University of Toronto's [Faculty of Information](https://ischool.utoronto.ca/), studying the forms and impacts of online harassment in Canadian politics using computational and statistical methods.
:::
